exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your weight loss forward
items: Set a specific weight loss goal by calculating your target weight and creating a realistic timeline with weekly milestones
Calculate your current daily caloric intake by tracking everything you eat and drink for 3 consecutive days using a nutrition app or food diary
Schedule a comprehensive health checkup with your doctor to assess your current health status and discuss your weight loss goals
Define your ideal body image and health goals by writing a detailed description of how you want to look, feel, and function at your target weight
Track your current physical measurements and take body progress photos to establish baseline metrics beyond just weight
Research and identify 3 sustainable physical activities you enjoy and can realistically commit to weekly
